parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "User" WHERE "createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS new_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Enrollment" WHERE "createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS new_enrollments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Booking" WHERE "createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS new_bookings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "ConsentRecord" WHERE type = 'MARKETING_EMAIL' AND granted AND "grantedAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::int AS new_marketing_optins,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "User")::int AS total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Enrollment")::int AS total_enrollments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Certificate")::int AS total_certificates;
